description: Create or update an agent. Returns: 'agent {name} saved'. Agents define specialized system prompts that are reusable with call_llm(agent="<name>", ...). Agent name rules: lowercase, letters + digits + hyphens only (no spaces, no underscores), kebab-case recommended. Agent names are case-sensitive — "Python" and "python" are different agents. Use list_agent to see available agents. Example: add_agent(name="python-expert", prompt="You are a Python expert.")
name: add_agent

name.description: Agent name. Must match: lowercase letters, digits, hyphens only. Case-sensitive. Example: 'python-expert'

prompt.description: System prompt for this agent. Common rules are automatically prepended
